title: E-commerce Product Listing with Search and Filtering

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Listing with Search and Filtering

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(50, 25) scale(1, 1)'>
  <rect x='0' y='0' width='400' height='300' fill='#090a0f' rx='10'/>
  <rect x='16' y='16' width='368' height='268' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
  <g transform='translate(30, 35)' fill='#C06C88'>
    <text x='0' y='0' text-anchor='start' font-size='24'>Product List</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(30, 90)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='30' fill='#C06C88' rx='5'/>
    <text x='10' y='10' text-anchor='start' font-size='18'>Search:</text>
    <rect x='100' y='5' width='90' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
    <text x='110' y='15' text-anchor='start' font-size='18'>Filter:</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(30, 140)'>
    <g transform='translate(0, 0)' fill='#B7D7CD'>
      <rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='30' rx='5'/>
      <text x='10' y='10' text-anchor='start' font-size='18'>Price Range:</text>
      <rect x='100' y='5' width='90' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
    </g>
    <g transform='translate(250, 0)'>
      <rect x='0' y='0' width='50' height='50' fill='#411C56' rx='25'/>
      <text x='0' y='25' text-anchor='start' font-size='18'>+</text>
    </g>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(30, 190)'>
    <g transform='translate(0, 0)' fill='#B7D7CD'>
      <rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='30' rx='5'/>
      <text x='10' y='10' text-anchor='start' font-size='18'>Sort By:</text>
      <rect x='100' y='5' width='90' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
    </g>
  </g>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Search and filter functionality must be implemented using React Hooks

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Listing with Search and Filtering

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify the search and filter functionality updates the product list in real-time, and there are no broken links or dead states.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
